title: coulteria glabra
intro: Coulteria glabra, also known as Coulter's clover or Coulter's bitter clover, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coulteria glabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and coughs, and soothe stomach issues such as nausea and indigestion. Coulteria glabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with herbal preparations often utilizing its leaves and flowers to harness its medicinal properties.
